4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new 22:["$","div",null,{"ref":"$undefined","className":"rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,16,30,0.92),rgba(8,10,22,0.96))] shadow-[0_20px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.28)] backdrop-blur mt-10","children":["$","div",null,{"ref":"$undefined","className":"p-6 sm:p-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","$1","block-0",{"children":["$","h1","h1-2",{"className":"text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl","children":"Protocol Specification"}]}],["$","$1","block-1",{"children":["$","h2","h2-7",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"1. Scope"}]}],["$","$1","block-2",{"children":["$","p","p-10",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"This document defines the intended protocol behavior of PrivateDAO as implemented in the current repository."}]}],["$","$1","block-3",{"children":["$","p","p-12",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"It is not a proposal for redesign. It is a structured description of the implemented governance lifecycle, commit-reveal semantics, execution rules, and core invariants."}]}],["$","$1","block-4",{"children":["$","p","p-14",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The repository also includes a non-breaking zk stack. That stack is not part of the currently deployed instruction interface and is described explicitly so reviewers do not confuse additive zk work with the live protocol surface."}]}],["$","$1","block-5",{"children":["$","h2","h2-18",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"2. System Roles"}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","ul","l-38",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-38-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`DAO authority`"}],["$","li","l-38-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"initializes a DAO"}],["$","li","l-38-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may cancel an open proposal"}],["$","li","l-38-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may veto a passed but not-yet-executed proposal during the timelock window"}],["$","li","l-38-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Governance token holder`"}],["$","li","l-38-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may create proposals if token ownership requirements are satisfied"}],["$","li","l-38-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may commit and reveal votes"}],["$","li","l-38-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may delegate voting power for a single proposal"}],["$","li","l-38-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Delegatee`"}],["$","li","l-38-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may consume delegated voting power for the bound proposal"}],["$","li","l-38-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Keeper`"}],["$","li","l-38-11",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may reveal on behalf of a voter if explicitly authorized at commit time"}],["$","li","l-38-12",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Permissionless finalizer`"}],["$","li","l-38-13",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may finalize once reveal conditions are satisfied"}],["$","li","l-38-14",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Permissionless executor`"}],["$","li","l-38-15",{"className":"list-disc","children":"may execute once a proposal is passed and timelock conditions are satisfied"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","h2","h2-41",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"3. Core Accounts"}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","ul","l-64",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-64-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`DAO`"}],["$","li","l-64-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"governance token configuration"}],["$","li","l-64-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"quorum and timing configuration"}],["$","li","l-64-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"authority"}],"$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31"]}]}],"$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44","$L45","$L46","$L47","$L48","$L49","$L4a","$L4b","$L4c","$L4d","$L4e","$L4f","$L50","$L51","$L52","$L53","$L54","$L55","$L56","$L57","$L58","$L59","$L5a","$L5b","$L5c","$L5d","$L5e","$L5f","$L60","$L61","$L62","$L63","$L64","$L65","$L66","$L67","$L68","$L69","$L6a","$L6b","$L6c","$L6d","$L6e","$L6f","$L70","$L71","$L72","$L73","$L74","$L75","$L76","$L77","$L78","$L79","$L7a","$L7b","$L7c","$L7d","$L7e","$L7f","$L80","$L81","$L82","$L83","$L84","$L85","$L86","$L87","$L88","$L89","$L8a","$L8b","$L8c","$L8d","$L8e","$L8f","$L90","$L91","$L92","$L93","$L94"]}]}]}]
23:["$","li","l-64-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal counter"}]

39:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","ul","l-108",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-108-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Voting` with `now < voting_end`"}],["$","li","l-108-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"commit phase"}],["$","li","l-108-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Voting` with `voting_end <= now < reveal_end`"}],["$","li","l-108-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal phase"}],["$","li","l-108-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Passed` with `now < execution_unlocks_at` and `is_executed = false`"}],["$","li","l-108-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"timelocked, vetoable phase"}],["$","li","l-108-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Passed` with `now >= execution_unlocks_at` and `is_executed = false`"}],["$","li","l-108-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"executable phase"}],["$","li","l-108-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Passed` with `is_executed = true`"}],["$","li","l-108-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"executed terminal state"}]]}]}]
3a:["$","$1","block-17",{"children":["$","h3","h3-111",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"4.3 Allowed Transitions"}]}]
3b:["$","$1","block-18",{"children":["$","ul","l-127",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-127-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"DAO initialization"}],["$","li","l-127-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"no proposal state transition"}],["$","li","l-127-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Voting` -> `Cancelled`"}],["$","li","l-127-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"via `cancel_proposal`"}],["$","li","l-127-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Voting` -> `Passed`"}],["$","li","l-127-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"via `finalize_proposal` after reveal window closes and pass conditions are satisfied"}],["$","li","l-127-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Voting` -> `Failed`"}],["$","li","l-127-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"via `finalize_proposal` after reveal window closes and pass conditions are not satisfied"}],["$","li","l-127-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Passed` -> `Vetoed`"}],["$","li","l-127-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"via `veto_proposal` during timelock and before execution"}],["$","li","l-127-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Passed` with `is_executed = false` -> `Passed` with `is_executed = true`"}],["$","li","l-127-11",{"className":"list-disc","children":"via `execute_proposal` after unlock"}]]}]}]
3c:["$","$1","block-19",{"children":["$","h3","h3-130",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"4.4 Forbidden Transitions"}]}]
3d:["$","$1","block-20",{"children":["$","ul","l-146",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-146-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"commit after commit window closes"}],["$","li","l-146-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal before commit"}],["$","li","l-146-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal before voting end"}],["$","li","l-146-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal after reveal window closes"}],["$","li","l-146-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"finalize before reveal window closes"}],["$","li","l-146-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"finalize from non-`Voting` status"}],["$","li","l-146-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execute before finalize"}],["$","li","l-146-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execute before timelock unlock"}],["$","li","l-146-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execute twice"}],["$","li","l-146-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"veto after execution"}],["$","li","l-146-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"veto after timelock expiry"}],["$","li","l-146-11",{"className":"list-disc","children":"regression from finalized/cancelled/vetoed states back to `Voting`"}]]}]}]

4a:["$","$1","block-33",{"children":["$","ul","l-215",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-215-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal must still be in `Voting`"}],["$","li","l-215-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"current time must be at or after `voting_end`"}],["$","li","l-215-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"current time must be before `reveal_end`"}],["$","li","l-215-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"voter record must already be committed"}],["$","li","l-215-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"voter record must not already be revealed"}],["$","li","l-215-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"signer must be either:"}],["$","li","l-215-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the bound voter"}],["$","li","l-215-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the bound keeper (`voter_reveal_authority`)"}],["$","li","l-215-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"recomputed commitment must equal stored commitment"}]]}]}]

61:["$","$1","block-56",{"children":["$","ul","l-304",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-304-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`TokenWeighted`"}],["$","li","l-304-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`yes_capital > no_capital`"}],["$","li","l-304-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Quadratic`"}],["$","li","l-304-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`yes_community > no_community`"}],["$","li","l-304-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"assumes an external sybil-resistance or identity policy"}],["$","li","l-304-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`DualChamber`"}],["$","li","l-304-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"both capital and community thresholds must be satisfied"}]]}]}]

64:["$","$1","block-59",{"children":["$","ul","l-315",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-315-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"status becomes `Passed`"}],["$","li","l-315-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`execution_unlocks_at = now + execution_delay_seconds`"}]]}]}]
65:["$","$1","block-60",{"children":["$","p","p-316",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"If failed:"}]}]

72:["$","$1","block-73",{"children":["$","ul","l-370",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-370-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`treasury_recipient == action.recipient`"}],["$","li","l-370-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"action contains token mint"}],["$","li","l-370-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"source and destination token accounts are owned by the token program"}],["$","li","l-370-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"token account data length sanity checks pass"}],["$","li","l-370-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury token owner equals treasury PDA"}],["$","li","l-370-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury token mint equals configured action mint"}],["$","li","l-370-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"recipient token mint equals configured action mint"}],["$","li","l-370-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"source and destination token accounts are not the same account"}],["$","li","l-370-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"recipient token owner equals configured recipient"}]]}]}]

76:["$","$1","block-77",{"children":["$","p","p-378",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The current implementation intentionally rejects `CustomCPI` rather than exposing an event-only success path or arbitrary CPI execution."}]}]
77:["$","$1","block-78",{"children":["$","p","p-380",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Effect:"}]}]
78:["$","$1","block-79",{"children":["$","ul","l-386",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-386-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal creation or execution that attempts `CustomCPI` is rejected"}],["$","li","l-386-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"no treasury movement or execution flag mutation occurs"}],["$","li","l-386-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the live protocol does not claim arbitrary CPI execution inside the PrivateDAO program"}]]}]}]
79:["$","$1","block-80",{"children":["$","h2","h2-389",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"8. Authority Rules"}]}]
7a:["$","$1","block-81",{"children":["$","ul","l-413",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-413-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`initialize_dao`"}],["$","li","l-413-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"requires DAO authority signer"}],["$","li","l-413-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`create_proposal`"}],["$","li","l-413-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"requires proposer signer with governance token ownership"}],["$","li","l-413-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`cancel_proposal`"}],["$","li","l-413-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"authority only"}],["$","li","l-413-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`veto_proposal`"}],["$","li","l-413-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"authority only"}],["$","li","l-413-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`commit_vote`"}],["$","li","l-413-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"voter signer only"}],["$","li","l-413-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`delegate_vote`"}],["$","li","l-413-11",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delegator signer only"}],["$","li","l-413-12",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`commit_delegated_vote`"}],["$","li","l-413-13",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delegatee signer only"}],["$","li","l-413-14",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`reveal_vote`"}],["$","li","l-413-15",{"className":"list-disc","children":"voter or authorized keeper only"}],["$","li","l-413-16",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`finalize_proposal`"}],["$","li","l-413-17",{"className":"list-disc","children":"permissionless"}],["$","li","l-413-18",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`execute_proposal`"}],["$","li","l-413-19",{"className":"list-disc","children":"permissionless"}]]}]}]

80:["$","$1","block-87",{"children":["$","h3","h3-441",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Commit-Reveal Invariants"}]}]
81:["$","$1","block-88",{"children":["$","ul","l-450",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-450-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`has_revealed => has_committed`"}],["$","li","l-450-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal count never exceeds commit count"}],["$","li","l-450-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"invalid reveal does not mutate tally"}],["$","li","l-450-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"revealed tally only comes from valid commitments"}],["$","li","l-450-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal-scoped replay protection is enforced both by proposal-bound commitments and by voter-record PDA binding"}]]}]}]
82:["$","$1","block-89",{"children":["$","h3","h3-453",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Execution Invariants"}]}]
83:["$","$1","block-90",{"children":["$","ul","l-462",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-462-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"successful execute is the only valid path that sets `is_executed = true`"}],["$","li","l-462-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"failed execute does not set `is_executed`"}],["$","li","l-462-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"duplicate execute does not create duplicate treasury effects"}],["$","li","l-462-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury balance delta must equal intended action amount on successful execute"}],["$","li","l-462-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal rebate is only paid when the proposal account remains rent-safe; it is not a treasury payout"}]]}]}]
84:["$","$1","block-91",{"children":["$","h3","h3-465",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Binding Invariants"}]}]
85:["$","$1","block-92",{"children":["$","ul","l-474",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-474-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal belongs to exactly one DAO"}],["$","li","l-474-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"voter record belongs to exactly one proposal and one voter"}],["$","li","l-474-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delegation belongs to exactly one proposal and one delegator"}],["$","li","l-474-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury belongs to exactly one DAO"}],["$","li","l-474-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execution accounts must be exact, not approximate or merely initialized"}]]}]}]
86:["$","$1","block-93",{"children":["$","h3","h3-477",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"ZK Overlay Invariants"}]}]

88:["$","$1","block-95",{"children":["$","h3","h3-489",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Strict V2 Overlay Invariants"}]}]
89:["$","$1","block-96",{"children":["$","ul","l-500",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-500-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict ZK finalization requires `ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot`"}],["$","li","l-500-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict ZK finalization requires `ProposalProofVerification.status == Verified`"}],["$","li","l-500-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict ZK proof records must be DAO-bound and proposal-bound"}],["$","li","l-500-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict ZK proof records must match the canonical V2 proposal payload hash"}],["$","li","l-500-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict ZK proof records must be fresh at finalization time"}],["$","li","l-500-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"threshold-attested proof verification is an explicit on-chain trust model, not a cryptographic verifier CPI claim"}],["$","li","l-500-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict proof companion accounts cannot be overwritten with a different strict payload after recording"}]]}]}]
8a:["$","$1","block-97",{"children":["$","h3","h3-503",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Settlement V2 Invariants"}]}]
8b:["$","$1","block-98",{"children":["$","ul","l-513",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-513-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict confidential payout execution requires `SettlementEvidence.status == Verified`"}],["$","li","l-513-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict settlement evidence must be DAO-bound, proposal-bound, payout-plan-bound, and canonical-payout-field-bound"}],["$","li","l-513-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict settlement evidence must be fresh at execution time"}],["$","li","l-513-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict settlement evidence is consumed through a single-use `SettlementConsumptionRecord` PDA"}],["$","li","l-513-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strict settlement evidence accounts cannot be overwritten with a different evidence payload after recording"}],["$","li","l-513-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the same settlement evidence cannot execute two payouts"}]]}]}]
8c:["$","$1","block-99",{"children":["$","h3","h3-516",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Policy Transition Invariants"}]}]

93:["$","$1","block-106",{"children":["$","h2","h2-561",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"11. Known Limits of the Current Specification"}]}]
94:["$","$1","block-107",{"children":["$","ul","l-569",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-569-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"this specification reflects the current repository behavior, not an aspirational redesign"}],["$","li","l-569-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"commit-reveal hides vote content, not timing metadata"}],["$","li","l-569-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Groth16 witness generation and proving remain off-chain. Legacy `zk_enforced` receipts are retained for compatibility, while the V2 strict path adds companion proof-verification accounts, threshold-attested verification, canonical payload binding, expiry, and object-level policy snapshots. This is stronger than legacy receipt metadata, but still an attested fallback until a cryptographic verifier CPI is integrated."}],["$","li","l-569-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"no external audit is claimed by this document"}]]}]}]
